context.approach: User-uploaded screenshots reviewed by the multimodal GTM synthesis layer against the same seven UX/UI audit axes.

methodology.description: Screenshots are uploaded directly by the user and preserved as report evidence.
A multimodal model reviews visible UI evidence against seven GTM UX/UI axes.
The highest-impact issues are translated into sales-facing recommendations and a static report.

profile.visual_review_goal: Evaluate uploaded UI screenshots against the same seven GTM UX/UI audit axes used by the website audit mode.

focusScreenshots.title: README

axes.name: Task Execution
axes.description: How clearly the product helps users complete key actions without friction.
axes.summary: Task Execution was reviewed from the uploaded screenshots.
axes.businessImpact: Friction in key tasks increases drop-off and weakens the product story in a live sales context.
opportunities: Use the screenshot evidence to refine task execution before launch.

axes.name: Flow & Architecture
axes.description: How understandable the information architecture and navigation model feel.
axes.summary: Flow & Architecture was reviewed from the uploaded screenshots.
axes.businessImpact: Weak architecture slows comprehension and makes the offer feel less mature.
opportunities: Use the screenshot evidence to refine flow & architecture before launch.

axes.name: Trust & Accessibility
axes.description: How credible, safe, and accessible the experience appears for real-world usage.
axes.summary: Trust & Accessibility was reviewed from the uploaded screenshots.
axes.businessImpact: Trust and accessibility gaps create perceived risk and narrow the reachable audience.
opportunities: Use the screenshot evidence to refine trust & accessibility before launch.

axes.name: UI Consistency
axes.description: How consistently components, styles, spacing, and interaction patterns are applied.
axes.summary: UI Consistency was reviewed from the uploaded screenshots.
axes.businessImpact: Inconsistent UI signals reduce perceived product maturity and scalability.
opportunities: Use the screenshot evidence to refine ui consistency before launch.

axes.name: Visual Brand
axes.description: How the visual direction expresses the brand and supports persuasive storytelling.
axes.summary: Visual Brand was reviewed from the uploaded screenshots.
axes.businessImpact: A weak visual narrative lowers memorability and product differentiation.
opportunities: Use the screenshot evidence to refine visual brand before launch.

axes.name: Content & Microcopy
axes.description: How clearly messaging, labels, and calls to action communicate value and next steps.
axes.summary: Content & Microcopy was reviewed from the uploaded screenshots.
axes.businessImpact: Unclear messaging makes the value proposition harder to understand and repeat.
opportunities: Use the screenshot evidence to refine content & microcopy before launch.

axes.name: Market Alignment
axes.description: How well the offer, audience cues, proof points, and CTA strategy support a GTM story.
axes.summary: Market Alignment was reviewed from the uploaded screenshots.
axes.businessImpact: Weak GTM alignment makes it harder for prospects to see why this product fits them now.
opportunities: Use the screenshot evidence to refine market alignment before launch.

strongestAxis.name: Task Execution
strongestAxis.description: How clearly the product helps users complete key actions without friction.
strongestAxis.summary: Task Execution was reviewed from the uploaded screenshots.
strongestAxis.businessImpact: Friction in key tasks increases drop-off and weakens the product story in a live sales context.
opportunities: Use the screenshot evidence to refine task execution before launch.

weakestAxis.name: Task Execution
weakestAxis.description: How clearly the product helps users complete key actions without friction.
weakestAxis.summary: Task Execution was reviewed from the uploaded screenshots.
weakestAxis.businessImpact: Friction in key tasks increases drop-off and weakens the product story in a live sales context.
opportunities: Use the screenshot evidence to refine task execution before launch.
